mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 in the positive direction over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are positive in >65% of observations when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 4.5 percent, labor market slack triggers recession fears that override growth optimism, causing institutional investors to de-risk and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in a t-test against baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and rising consumer prices indicate stagflationary pressure that erodes corporate profit margins and consumer purchasing power, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when RSAFS falls and CPIAUCSL rises, with a walk-forward Sharpe ratio below -0.5 over any 24-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals strengthening supply-side capacity that resolves inventory bottlenecks and boosts near-term earnings revisions, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: The mechanism reverses direction during early-cycle expansions, yielding negative 5-day returns in >55% of cases when INDPRO growth accelerates.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands aggregate consumer income and supports corporate revenue growth, creating a persistent positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or positive payroll growth correlates with negative forward returns in >60% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts falling below 1.5 million units signals a sharp contraction in construction demand and household wealth effects, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of instances when HOUST drops below 1500, or the threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with falling unemployment indicates robust economic expansion without overheating, which supports equity valuations and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term loses predictive power (p > 0.10) in a multivariate regression over a 36-month horizon.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation forces markets to price in aggressive central bank tightening, which increases discount rates and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Positive CPIAUCSL momentum correlates with positive 5-day returns in >60% of observations, or the signal fails to predict direction during high inflation periods.
